$comment: scripts/WardensHouse.asm — the toothless WARDEN: OFAOFA without the GOLD TEETH; with them the trade (taking the teeth first frees the bag slot HM04 lands in, so the direct give cannot overflow — the retired beat's bag ops verbatim).

then.text:
WARDEN: Thanks to
you I can wear my
dentures again!

WARDEN: OH! My
GOLD TEETH! You found them! Here, take this
in gratitude!

HM04 is STRENGTH! A POKéMON can use
it to move giant
boulders!

else.text:
WARDEN: OFAOFA!
KEKEKE! (He has no teeth
and can't speak
clearly...)
